@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed the right data sources but, in the execute_python step (call_pTSnkjJKsF1qiP8NhczWySdh), its has_parking function only counted BusinessParking when any subfield in the nested dict was True (and otherwise treated presence as False), adding an overly strict condition that undercounted qualifying businesses and yielded 21 instead of 35.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly identified businesses with 2018 reviews and fetched their attributes, but its execute_python parsing logic (reading var_call_JWziLTIBqPtgz9IE50AqMUpx) undercounted by failing to robustly recognize “BikeParking”/“BusinessParking” offerings from heterogeneous string/dict attribute formats, resulting in 21 instead of the correct 35.
B. Failure modes encountered:

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying 36 businesses with 2018 reviews (call_F4dS9NSoHjtdcLswZqJdNG6q), the agent retrieved only 5 corresponding business documents from Mongo (call_nnk7s1WpzBCvNHBnEOCYOP4d) and then, in execute_python, implicitly treated all missing businesses as not offering parking, leading to an undercount of 3 instead of the true 35.
B. Failure modes encountered:

The agent correctly gathered 36 businesses with 2018 reviews (var_call_M7m0FWL9jVz5IGseSiKfqiIE) but then only retrieved attributes for 5 of them from the business collection (var_call_s13VpD3OovpptLkLcXUb7819) and computed the result from this incomplete subset in execute_python (var_call_K5ChtbqUIMn0Kwd92doNwf7U), leading to an undercount of 3 instead of 35.

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent implemented parking detection by searching for the substring 'True' in the BusinessParking and BikeParking attribute strings (see execute_python call_PaNyp5BVqPyN3QmH1Cr7tj4T), which excluded businesses that had the BusinessParking attribute present but without 'True' (e.g., businessid_35 and businessid_37 from the contributing Mongo queries), leading to an undercount (20 vs. the ground truth 35).
